variants: Galen Deveraux specializes in forest management, drawing on years of rigorous study and practice in the field. Galen has also gained significant recognition for his work, with publications in the Stellar Niche Review, a renowned journal in the environmental sciences. His research and projects have been primarily funded by the Foxglove Fellowship Initiative, which supports innovative approaches to forest management.
